title: Skill registry
outcome: Skill registry stood up. New skill.schema.json (draft-07). registry.sh gains archon_skill_record flattener; archon_emit_skills projects curated TOML into compact skills.json. archon-validate gains _validate_skills (required keys, id/kind/source enums, touches⇒risks). Four curated POC records (review, improve, qmd, ponytail) with version pins from host skill bodies and passing scan cache. .agents/skills/README.md replaced stub with real contract. New docs/agent-skills.md documents registry model and token thesis.
validation: moon run archon:validate PASS including skills; moon run archon:sync → skills.json with 4+ flattened skill records (9 total after later stories' files present in tree — S1 gate: ≥4 curated skills). Each record maps id/source/supported_agent_apps/allowed_contexts/inputs/outputs/risks/validator.
decisions: review id maps body_ref pre-review-guide (installed review skill on host)
Version pin uses sha256 prefix of SKILL.md when skills-lock.json entry absent
Registry holds records only; bodies stay under SKILLS_HOME
token_note: Skill ID in context vs full skill body — registry indexes metadata only; the biggest avoidable context cost after command output is pre-loading skill catalogs.
